Blogs.title: Tomato – The Heart-Friendly Vegetable
Blogs.shortDesc: Rich in antioxidants, tomatoes support heart health and glowing skin.
Blogs.author: Admin
Blogs.content:
Tomatoes are rich in lycopene, a powerful antioxidant.

Health Benefits:
- Improves heart health
- Protects against cancer
- Enhances skin glow

Usage:
Used in curries, salads, sauces, and juices.
